title: TTP Behavioral Receipt
description: A signed, tamper-evident record of observed agent behavior produced by an independent issuer.

ttp_version.description: Protocol version. MUST be '1.0' for this specification.

receipt_id.description: UUID v4 uniquely identifying this receipt. Used for deduplication at the Trust Authority.

agent_id.description: Stable identifier of the agent this receipt attests to.

issuer_id.description: Identifier of the issuer that observed the behavior and produced this receipt.

event_type.description: Category of the observed event. Standard types: api_call, tool_execution, inference_output, data_access, financial_transaction, safety_monitor. Custom types MUST use reverse-domain notation.

event_data.description: Optional issuer-specific context for the observed event. MUST NOT contain PII.

domain.description: Trust domain this receipt applies to. Must match the domain of any token that aggregates this receipt.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the event was observed by the issuer.

score.description: Issuer's behavioral assessment: 0.0 (critical violation) to 1.0 (excellent behavior). See scoring-semantics.md for guidance.

signature.description: Base64url-encoded Ed25519 signature over the canonical JSON payload (all fields except 'signature', keys sorted lexicographically, no whitespace). Signature covers SHA-256 of the canonical bytes.
